name: Spatial Normalization for Cross-Domain Retinal Layer Segmentation in Optical Coherence Tomography
summary: arXiv:2607.16065v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Retinal layer segmentation in Optical Coherence Tomography (OCT) is a fundamental step for extracting quantitative biomarkers of retinal structure....
description: arXiv:2607.16065v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Retinal layer segmentation in Optical Coherence Tomography (OCT) is a fundamental step for extracting quantitative biomarkers of retinal structure. Indeed, there is a growing interest in the analysis of OCTs in the context of neurodegenerative diseases. However, segmentation remains challenging due to speckle noise, shadowing artifacts, low cont...
author: Iker Moran-Cavero, Monica Hernandez, Elvira Mayordomo, Naiara Artiaga, Beatriz Pardi\~nas, Beatriz Cordon, Elena Garcia-Martin
